name: deep-research
description: Fan-out web research with adversarial claim verification and cited synthesis
whenToUse: When you need a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Decompose question into 5 search angles

phases.title: Search
phases.detail: 5 parallel web search agents

phases.title: Fetch
phases.detail: Dedup URLs, fetch top 15 sources, extract claims

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: 3-vote adversarial verification per claim

phases.title: Synthesize
phases.detail: Merge dupes, rank by confidence, cite sources

name: competitive-analysis
description: Multi-angle competitive research producing a SWOT and positioning summary
whenToUse: When evaluating a product, company, or technology against competitors

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define target and 5 research angles

phases.title: Research
phases.detail: Parallel research: product / pricing / reviews / community / roadmap

phases.title: SWOT
phases.detail: Synthesize strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats

phases.title: Position
phases.detail: Produce positioning recommendations

name: tech-evaluation
description: Scored technology evaluation across DX, performance, security, ecosystem, and community
whenToUse: When choosing between technologies, frameworks, or libraries for a project

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Define candidates and evaluation criteria

phases.title: Evaluate
phases.detail: 5 parallel dimension agents per candidate

phases.title: Score
phases.detail: Build weighted scoring matrix

phases.title: Recommend
phases.detail: Produce ranked recommendation with trade-offs

name: code-audit
description: Parallel security + quality + performance audit with adversarial finding verification
whenToUse: When you need a comprehensive code review before a release or security review

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Build file list from git diff or path argument

phases.title: Audit
phases.detail: 3 parallel auditors: security / quality / performance

phases.title: Verify
phases.detail: Adversarial verification of high-severity findings

phases.title: Report
phases.detail: Risk-ranked report with actionable remediation

name: feature-planner
description: Sequential pipeline: brief → PRD → architecture → user stories
whenToUse: When starting a new feature and need a complete specification before coding

phases.title: Brief
phases.detail: Clarify goals, users, success criteria

phases.title: PRD
phases.detail: Generate product requirements document

phases.title: Architecture
phases.detail: Design technical architecture and data flow

phases.title: Stories
phases.detail: Break into implementation user stories

name: pr-review
description: 4-dimensional parallel PR review: correctness, security, performance, style → consensus verdict
whenToUse: When you want a thorough multi-perspective review of a pull request or diff

phases.title: Scope
phases.detail: Read diff and build review context

phases.title: Review
phases.detail: 4 parallel reviewers: correctness / security / performance / style

phases.title: Consensus
phases.detail: Merge findings, deduplicate, score severity

phases.title: Verdict
phases.detail: Produce APPROVED / CHANGES REQUIRED verdict with findings

name: tdd-sprint
description: Strict Red-Green-Refactor TDD loop with spec-first discipline
whenToUse: When implementing a feature or fix using test-driven development methodology

phases.title: Spec
phases.detail: Define behavior requirements and acceptance criteria

phases.title: Red
phases.detail: Write failing test that captures the requirement

phases.title: Green
phases.detail: Write minimal code to make the test pass

phases.title: Refactor
phases.detail: Clean up while keeping tests green, verify all pass

name: refactor-plan
description: Technical debt scan → risk-sorted sequence → safe refactor implementation plan
whenToUse: When you need to plan a refactoring safely without breaking existing behavior

phases.title: Scan
phases.detail: Identify technical debt, complexity hotspots, dead code

phases.title: Prioritize
phases.detail: Risk-sort by blast radius and test coverage

phases.title: Sequence
phases.detail: Order changes to minimize merge conflicts

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Produce step-by-step refactor plan with verification gates

name: incident-response
description: Parallel investigation across logs, metrics, traces, and code → mitigation → RCA → postmortem
whenToUse: When responding to a production incident or unexpected system failure

phases.title: Alert
phases.detail: Characterize the incident: impact, scope, timeline

phases.title: Investigate
phases.detail: 4 parallel agents: logs / metrics / traces / code changes

phases.title: Mitigate
phases.detail: Identify and apply immediate mitigation steps

phases.title: RCA
phases.detail: Root cause analysis and postmortem document

name: release-prep
description: Automated release pipeline: tests → changelog → version bump → PR → announcement draft
whenToUse: When preparing a production release and need all release artifacts generated

phases.title: Check
phases.detail: Run tests, verify no uncommitted changes, check CI status

phases.title: Changelog
phases.detail: Generate changelog from commits since last release

phases.title: Bump
phases.detail: Update version in all required files

phases.title: PR
phases.detail: Create release PR and draft announcement

name: onboard-codebase
description: Map structure → domain analysis → architecture → generate guided tour and onboarding docs
whenToUse: When joining a new codebase or onboarding a team member to an existing repo

phases.title: Map
phases.detail: Discover file structure, languages, entry points

phases.title: Domain
phases.detail: Identify business domains and core abstractions

phases.title: Architecture
phases.detail: Map layers, data flow, and key patterns

phases.title: Tour
phases.detail: Generate guided tour and onboarding documentation

name: perf-optimize
description: Profile → parallel bottleneck hunt across DB/network/CPU/memory → prioritized fix plan
whenToUse: When an application is slow and you need to find and fix performance bottlenecks

phases.title: Profile
phases.detail: Establish baseline metrics and identify slow paths

phases.title: Identify
phases.detail: 4 parallel agents: DB queries / network / CPU / memory

phases.title: Plan
phases.detail: Prioritize fixes by impact-to-effort ratio

phases.title: Benchmark
phases.detail: Define verification benchmarks for each fix
